zh.lifeSummary: 當Angus Mor MacDonald Lord of the Isles於1249年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾易斯萊時，他的父親Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles80歲，母親Beatrix Stewart52歲。他於大約1270年與Helen Nic Campbell Of Lochawe在蘇格蘭阿吉爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1263年登記服兵役。他去世於1296年在英國蘇格蘭布特阿朗享年47歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾易斯爾 本 易納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Angus Mor MacDonald Lord of the Isles于1249年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾易斯萊时，他的父亲Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles80岁，母亲Beatrix Stewart52岁。他于大约1270年与Helen Nic Campbell Of Lochawe在苏格兰阿吉爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1263年登记服兵役。他去世于1296年在英国苏格兰布特阿朗享年47岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾易斯爾 本 易納。

nameMeanings.name: MacDonald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDonald
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Domhnaill ‘son of Domhnall’, a name derived from the Celtic elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Donald is an Anglicized form (via Latin) of this personal name used in Scotland, though the surname is also widespread in Ireland. The name is equivalent to Irish McDonnell and McConnell , and to Manx Cannell .

History: This is the name of the largest and most disparate of the Scottish clans (Clan Donald), associated in particular with the Hebrides and claiming descent from Domhnall mac Raghnaill mac Somhairle, who lived in the late 12th century. From that time until 1493 the head of the clan was known as Lord (or King) of the Isles. The reigns of the Lords of the Isles were always stormy, often in conflict with the kings of Scotland, and peppered with disasters. After a series of defeats in the 1480s, Eoin Mac Dhomhnaill a Ìle (John Macdonald of Islay, Earl of Ross and Lord of the Isles) forfeited his lands, his power, and his title as Lord of the Isles in 1493 to King James IV of Scotland. By then, a branch of the family had settled in the Antrim Glens in Ireland and members moved between the southern Hebrides and Ireland throughout the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Angus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the Scottish Gaelic name Aonghas . Though still having a Scottish flavour, it has been used increasingly in modern times also by people without Scottish connections.

variants.name: Aonghas
meanings: Pronounced ‘een-yis’; from Celtic words meaning ‘one’ and ‘choice’. This is the name of an ancient Celtic god, and is first recorded as a personal name in Adomnan's ‘Life of St Columba’, where it occurs in the form Oinogus(s)ius as the name of a man for whom the saint prophesied a long life and a peaceful death. This is also almost certainly the name of the 8th-century Pictish king variously recorded as Onnust and Hungus.

nameMeanings.name: Mor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name from mór ‘large, great’. This was the commonest of all girls’ names in late medieval Ireland, and has continued in use in both Ireland and Scotland to the present day.

en.lifeSummary: When Angus Mor MacDonald Lord of the Isles was born in 1249, in Islay, Argyll, Scotland, his father, Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles, was 80 and his mother, Beatrix Stewart, was 52. He married Helen Nic Campbell Of Lochawe about 1270, in Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1263. He died in 1296, in Arran, Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 47, and was buried in Isle of Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Angus Mor MacDonald Lord of the Isles est né en 1249, à Islay, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles, avait 80 ans et sa mère, Beatrix Stewart, avait 52 ans. Il a épousé Helen Nic Campbell Of Lochawe environ 1270, à Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1263. Il est décédé en 1296, à Arran, Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Isle of Iona, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Angus Mor MacDonald Lord of the Isles 1249 in Islay, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles 80 und seine Mutter Beatrix Stewart 52. Er hat um 1270 in Argyll, Scotland Helen Nic Campbell Of Lochawe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1263 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1296 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Arran, Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Isle of Iona, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Angus Mor MacDonald Lord of the Isles è nato il nel 1249 nel Islay, Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles, aveva 80 anni e il suo madre, Beatrix Stewart, aveva 52 anni. Lui sposato Helen Nic Campbell Of Lochawe circa 1270, nel Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1263. Morì nel 1296, nel Arran, Bute, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Isle of Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Angus Mor MacDonald Lord of the Islesが1249年にスコットランドアルグイルイスレイで生まれた時，父Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Islesは80歳，母Beatrix Stewartは52歳であった。約1270年にスコットランドアルグイルでHelen Nic Campbell Of Lochaweと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1263年に兵役登録をした。彼は1296年にイギリススコットランドブトアランで47歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルイスル オフ アイオナにて埋葬された。

ko.Islay, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 이슬레이
ko.Isle of Iona, Argyll and Bute, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 이슬일 프 이오나
ko.lifeSummary: Angus Mor MacDonald Lord of the Isles(이)가 1249년 스컷랜드 아그이 이슬레이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles(은)는 80세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrix Stewart(은)는 52세였다. 그는 대략 1270년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 Helen Nic Campbell Of Lochawe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1263년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1296년 영국 스코틀랜드 부트 아란에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 이슬일 프 이오나에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Angus Mor MacDonald Lord of the Isles nasceu em 1249, em Islay, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles, tinha 80 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix Stewart, tinha 52 anos. Ele casou-se com Helen Nic Campbell Of Lochawe aproximadamente 1270, em Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1263. Ele faleceu em 1296, em Arran, Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Isle of Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.Isle of Iona, Argyll and Bute, Scotland: исл оф иона, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Angus Mor MacDonald Lord of the Isles родился в 1249 г. в местности ислеи, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles было 80 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrix Stewart, 52. Он женился на женщине по имени Helen Nic Campbell Of Lochawe около 1270 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. В 1263 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1296 г. в местности арран, бут, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности исл оф иона, аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Angus Mor MacDonald Lord of the Isles nació en 1249, en Islay, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Donald Mac Raghnaill 3rd Lord of the Isles, tenía 80 años y su mamá, Beatrix Stewart, tenía 52 años. Se casó con Helen Nic Campbell Of Lochawe aproximadamente 1270, en Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1263. Murió en 1296, en Arran, Bute, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Isle of Iona, Argyll, Scotland.
